meta.title: Embeddings vs Fine Tuning  - Part 1, Embeddings
meta.description:
*Embedding Notebook*
1. Create Embeddings with OpenAI, marco, or Llama 2.
2. Run inference with injected embeddings 
Buy Access Here: https://buy.stripe.com/eVa5l6cWh0zpg7edRc

*Supervised Fine-tuning Notebook - see Part 2*
- Run fine-tuning using a Q&A dataset.
Buy Access Here: https://buy.stripe.com/4gw6pag8t5TJ9IQbJ6

*Fine-tuning Repository Access*
1. Supervised Fine-tuning Notebook
2. Q&A Dataset Preparation Scripts
3. Embedding Notebook (Scripts to create and use Embeddings)
4. Forum Support
Learn More: https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/

*Other Resources*
Presentation Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_rs38dKhojMHJJ2tVVYRv4s9bi3obas-BXyzsWGIoOA/edit?usp=sharing

SBERT Embeddings: https://www.sbert.net/docs/pretrained-models/msmarco-v5.html

0:00 Should I use embeddings or fine-tuning?
0:35 How does semantic search work?
2:10 How to use embeddings with a language model?
3:00 The two keys to success with embeddings
4:00 How do cosine similarity and dot product similarity work?
5:00 How to embed a dataset? Touch Rugby Rules
6:00 How to prepare data for embedding?
7:00 Chunking a dataset for embeddings
9:30 What length of embeddings should I use?
11:00 Loading Llama 2 13B with GPTQ in Google Colab
12:00 Installing Llama 2 13B with GPTQ
13:00 Llama Performance without Embeddings
16:00 What embeddings should I use?
16:40 How to use OpenAI Embeddings
17:10 Using SBERT or "Marco" embeddings
18:00 How to create embeddings from data.
19:30 Calculating similarity using the dot product
20:40 Evaluating performance using embeddings
22:45 Using ChatGPT to Evaluate Performance of Embeddings
24:30 Llama 13-B Incorrect, GPT-4 Correct
25:00 Llama 13-B and GPT-4 Incorrect
26:00 Embeddings incorrect AND Llama 13B and GPT-4 Hallucinate
27:33 Summary of Embeddings Performance with Llama 2 and GPT-4
28:40 Pro tips for further improving performance with embeddings
29:00 ColBERT approach to improve embeddings
30:05 Top Tips for using Embeddings with Language Models
